responses.welcome: 您好！欢迎来到 GrowWise School！🎓 我们为 Tri-Valley 家庭提供以下项目方向：{categories}。今天需要什么帮助？
responses.courses: GrowWise School 提供辅导、加速数学、英文与写作、STEM 拓展、编程、人工智能、机器人、工作坊与营地。请告诉我们孩子的年级或兴趣，以便推荐路径。
responses.assessment: 我们在多条学习路径上提供免费测评与试听式体验。简短沟通后，团队会推荐合适方案。
responses.pricing: 费用取决于最适合的项目组合。预约免费测评后，我们会提供清晰选项。
responses.contact: 您可以通过电话、邮件 contact@growwiseschool.org 或本聊天联系我们。我们通常在 24 小时内回复。
responses.fallback: 很乐意帮忙！GrowWise School 聚焦辅导、加速数学、英文与写作、STEM 拓展、编程、人工智能、机器人、工作坊与营地。您想先了解哪一项？

guidance.prompt: Not sure which path to choose?

hero.title: About GrowWise
hero.subtitle: Since 2024, GrowWise has been transforming education in Dublin, CA, through personalized K-12 instruction and innovative STEAM programs. We empower every student with the skills, knowledge, and confidence they need to succeed.

foundation.title: Our Foundation
foundation.subtitle: Everything we do is guided by our core mission, vision, and values that put student success at the center.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2024 in the heart of Dublin, California, GrowWise was born from a simple but powerful vision: every child deserves personalized education that meets them where they are and helps them reach their full potential.
story.p2: What started as a small tutoring center has grown into a comprehensive educational institution serving families throughout the Tri-Valley area. Our founder, Dr. Sarah Chen, recognized that traditional one-size-fits-all education wasn't serving the diverse learning needs of today's students.
story.p3: Today, GrowWise stands as a testament to what's possible when passionate educators combine proven teaching methods with innovative technology and genuine care for each student's success. We've helped over 325+ students not just improve their grades, but develop confidence, curiosity, and a lifelong love of learning.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to student success and educational excellence.

approach.title: Our Educational Approach
approach.subtitle: We believe effective education requires more than delivering content. Our approach is built on four core principles that ensure every student receives the support they need to succeed.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Our passionate educators bring years of experience and genuine care for student success to every lesson.

community.title: Community Impact
community.subtitle: We believe in giving back to the community that supports us, creating opportunities for all students to succeed.

testimonials.title: Why Parents Love GrowWise
testimonials.subtitle: Personalized learning. Real growth. Measurable success — every student, every grade.

location.title: Visit Our Dublin Center
location.subtitle: Located in the heart of Dublin, CA, our modern facility provides the perfect environment for learning and growth.

cta.title: Enroll Today and Unlock Your Kid's Potential!
